title: Beyond chatbots: How AI agents built a full OS, web apps, and more
summary: Google demonstrated AI agents executing complex multi-day engineering pipelines to build non-trivial software including a managed desktop OS and optimized 3D web applications. The video showcases the Agent Development Kit for enabling long-running autonomous agents.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates AI agents running long-running, multi-day pipelines to build non-trivial software, including operating systems and optimized web applications. The presentation shows agents working through dependent chains of complex engineering problems, a step past single-turn chatbot interactions. It covers multi-agent systems, sub-agents, and reasoning as the mechanisms behind this work, with the central takeaway that agents can sustain and coordinate extended engineering tasks rather than answer isolated prompts.
